text:
6: Part 7 (6—⑦, Roku (Nana)) is the 250 th chapter of the Hunter × Hunter manga, written and illustrated by Yoshihiro Togashi.

Synopsis

's arm]]

Having manifested Doctor Blythe, Pitou operates on the King's left arm while he continues his Gungi match with the blind girl. Pouf asks them how long the operation will take, and Pitou says two to three hours to fix it completely. He then asks them if they can't use their puppets or En during that time, and Pitou confirms this. Pouf offers to be the lookout, even though his own En doesn't compare to theirs.

Looking at the palace from a hill in the distance, Knov feels no trace of En and says that the rain will help provide cover, remembering he has to be careful even with night soon to come. He begins to run down toward the palace and grabs bunches of leaves to cover his arms and face, knowing he has to place three exits within the palace grounds as well as various clusters outside of it from where they can observe.

Knov hopes to use the surprise attack to separate the King from his Royal Guards, saying that killing the King is their top priority. He lies flat on the ground and reiterates his plan, knowing he has to be careful yet quick. He debates whether he should wait for the sun to set, but worries that if Pitou's En comes back on, it will make things impossible. He comes to terms with failing and resolves himself to move closer without fear.

It's stated that three humans not used for food currently reside in the palace: the Gungi player, Ming Jol-ik, and a director named Bizeff. He is said to be the one who controls East Gorteau behind the scenes, working out deals and communicating with other countries. Because of how invaluable he is as a resource, he is the only human allowed to remain by the King's side, and the man is seen answering various calls and using his laptop. As Knov slowly crawls toward the palace's outer wall, it's stated that the Royal Guards were against using any human sentries around the palace since they couldn't do anything against Nen and would make the palace vulnerable to infiltration.

Cheetu has recently returned, the only Squadron Leader present, along with six lesser Chimera Ants (with eleven total Ants inside the palace). More information is given about the Ants and their relationship to the Royal Guards, and even though Knov is unaware of all this, it's stated that this is his best and last chance to infiltrate the palace as he finally reaches its outer wall.

In his office, Bizeff lights another cigarette and is glad the Ants let him live, but says he has to convince them to let him hire at least three assistants or he will die from exhaustion. He checks the email on his laptop and sees that someone has sent him a reply regarding "fresh meat", scrolling through it as he licks his lips. He picks out five women to be sent to him, and in an undisclosed location, Marcos informs Palm that their bait has been taken, with Bizeff having chosen her as one of the women.
